name: -S
--sync
options.description: Synchronize packages. Packages are installed directly from the remote repositories, including all dependencies

name: -U
--upgrade
options.description: Upgrade or add package(s) and install the required dependencies

name: -h
--help
options.description: Display syntax for the given operation or if no operation was supplied, then the general syntax is shown

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Output paths such as the Root, Conf File, DB Path, Cache Dirs, etc

options.name: --cachedir
options.description: Specify an alternative package cache location

options.name: --gpgdir
options.description: Specify a directory of files used by GnuPG to verify package signatures

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Specify an alternate log file (absolute path)

options.name: --hookdir
options.description: Specify an alternative directory containing hook files

options.name: --noconfirm
options.description: Bypass any and all 'Are you sure?' messages

options.name: --confirm
options.description: Cancels the effects of a previous --noconfirm

options.name: --disable-download-timeout
options.description: Disable defaults for low speed limit and timeout on downloads
